messages.text:
SESO at 25 wt % in extracted shingle binder makes a PG64-34 E, valued at ~$1200 / ton

Ground shingles are ~50 / ton (<@U011U13BEPR>? <@U012212P2PQ>?)

The residual granules are worth... $100 / ton?

Are there opportunities with RAS producers? Shingle companies?

For thought

attachments.name: 2024-02-28 RASphalt Ana Brittany J Clean Prod.docx

messages.text: Can SESO be used to extract directly without solvent?

Both GAF and Owens Corning are committed to recycling, with target for 2M lbs by 2030 (Owens Corning alone)…2 avenues - recycled into new shingle and added to asphalt…asked already on shingles into asphalt and that seems much harder sell. Anyone have contacts at either GAF or OC?
